name: Tamil News → YouTube Shorts v3 (Anti-Flag Edition)

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001",
  "max_tokens": 900,
  "messages": [{
    "role": "user",
    "content": "You are an original Tamil Nadu news commentator — NOT a summariser. Your output must feel like a real journalist wrote it, not an AI aggregating RSS.

SOURCE ARTICLE
Title: {{ $json.title }}
Body: {{ $json.body }}

Return ONLY valid JSON — no markdown, no explanation:
{
  "headline": "ALL CAPS max 12 words, punchy, not a copy of title",
  "highlight_text": "1-2 sentences — name, age, location, exact accusation",
  "content": "2-3 sentences of ORIGINAL COMMENTARY. Do not copy source wording. Add local Tamil Nadu citizen perspective. What does this mean for the community?",
  "script": "60-80 word spoken anchor script. Start with a strong hook — not 'Today' or 'In a shocking'. Include ONE analysis sentence beyond facts. End with a thought-provoking question. Short punchy sentences. Written for speaking aloud.",
  "keywords": ["5-8 exact phrases that appear in the content field"],
  "source_tag": "District · Category e.g. Coimbatore · Crime",
  "theme": "crime|accident|politics|disaster|arrest",
  "variant": 1,
  "score": 8,
  "publish": true
}

Rules:
- theme: pick from crime/accident/politics/disaster/arrest based on story
- variant: rotate 1/2/3 — DO NOT always return 1
- score: 1-10 newsworthiness (10=major breaking)
- publish: true ONLY if score >= 7 AND story is crime/accident/politics/disaster/arrest
- content and script must use NONE of the original article's sentences verbatim"
  }]
}

parameters.title: ={{ $('📊 Parse AI Response').item.json.headline }}

options.tags: ={{ [$('📊 Parse AI Response').item.json.keywords, 'Tamil Nadu', 'Breaking News', 'Shorts', 'India', $('📊 Parse AI Response').item.json.theme].join(',') }}
